name: M5Gotchi
description: Pwnagotchi-style passive WiFi handshake collector for M5Stack devices (M5Cardputer and M5Stick-S3, both ESP32-S3). Passive capture only — authorized/lawful testing on networks you own.
note: Assets verified live against Devsur11/M5Gotchi v0.7 (2026-07-03): releases ship two prebuilt merged images, cardputer.bin + m5stick.bin — both ESP32-S3 (upstream README lists M5Cardputer, M5Stick-S3, M5Cardputer-adv, all S3; the 'm5stick' build is the S3 Stick, NOT the ESP32 StickC Plus2). Merged single-bin flashed at 0x0 (M5 web-flasher class). A microSD card is required for the firmware to run on Cardputer. Real-hardware flash offset pending the Stage-5 hardware gate.
label: M5Gotchi (Devsur11)
